tasks.subject: Task 0: Extend @taskcast/postgres ‚Äî array overload + buildMigrationFiles
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `EmbeddedMigration` type + `buildMigrationFiles` helper to `@taskcast/postgres`; extend `runMigrations()` to accept either a directory path or a pre-loaded `MigrationFile[]`. Backward-compatible.

**Files:**
- Modify: `packages/postgres/src/migration-runner.ts`
- Modify: `packages/postgres/src/index.ts`
- Modify: `packages/postgres/tests/unit/migration-runner.test.ts`
- Modify: `packages/postgres/tests/integration/migration-runner.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd packages/postgres && pnpm test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/postgres/src/migration-runner.ts","packages/postgres/src/index.ts","packages/postgres/tests/unit/migration-runner.test.ts","packages/postgres/tests/integration/migration-runner.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/postgres && pnpm test","acceptanceCriteria":["EmbeddedMigration interface exported from @taskcast/postgres","buildMigrationFiles helper exported, sorts by version, computes checksums","runMigrations accepts string | MigrationFile[]","All existing runMigrations tests still pass","Unit tests cover sort order, filename validation, checksum consistency, no input mutation","Integration test covers array overload against real Postgres"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: parseBooleanEnv (TS) + parse_boolean_env (Rust)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add boolean env var parser in both runtimes recognizing 1/true/yes/on (case-insensitive, trimmed) as truthy. Foundation for T3 (TS auto-migrate) and T6 (Rust auto-migrate).

**Files:**
- Modify: `packages/cli/src/utils.ts`
- Create: `packages/cli/tests/unit/parse-boolean-env.test.ts`
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/helpers.rs`

**Verify:** `cd packages/cli && pnpm test tests/unit/parse-boolean-env.test.ts && cd ../../rust/taskcast-cli && cargo test helpers::tests::boolean`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/cli/src/utils.ts","packages/cli/tests/unit/parse-boolean-env.test.ts","rust/taskcast-cli/src/helpers.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/cli && pnpm test tests/unit/parse-boolean-env.test.ts && cd ../../rust/taskcast-cli && cargo test helpers::tests::boolean","acceptanceCriteria":["parseBooleanEnv(undefined) and parseBooleanEnv('') return false","All of 1/true/TRUE/True/yes/YES/on/ON return true","All of 0/false/no/off/maybe/2 return false","Whitespace is trimmed","Rust parse_boolean_env behaves identically","100% branch coverage on both helpers"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CLI migration codegen + committed generated file
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build-time codegen script that embeds `migrations/postgres/*.sql` into `packages/cli/src/generated/postgres-migrations.ts` (committed to git). Enforces 3-digit zero-padded filename convention. Wires the generator into the cli `build` script.

**Files:**
- Create: `packages/cli/scripts/generate-migrations.mjs`
- Create: `packages/cli/src/generated/postgres-migrations.ts` (committed)
- Modify: `packages/cli/package.json` (build script)
- Modify: `packages/cli/vitest.config.ts` (coverage exclude `src/generated/**`)
- Create: `packages/cli/tests/unit/generate-migrations.test.ts`
- Create: `packages/cli/tests/unit/generated-migrations.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd packages/cli && pnpm build && pnpm test tests/unit/generate-migrations.test.ts tests/unit/generated-migrations.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/cli/scripts/generate-migrations.mjs","packages/cli/src/generated/postgres-migrations.ts","packages/cli/package.json","packages/cli/vitest.config.ts","packages/cli/tests/unit/generate-migrations.test.ts","packages/cli/tests/unit/generated-migrations.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/cli && pnpm build && pnpm test tests/unit/generate-migrations.test.ts tests/unit/generated-migrations.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["Generator writes atomically (.tmp + rename)","Generator rejects filenames not matching ^\\d{3}_[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\\.sql$","Generator throws on empty source dir","Generated TS imports EmbeddedMigration from @taskcast/postgres","SQL preserved byte-for-byte via JSON.stringify","pnpm build runs the generator before tsc","pnpm lint succeeds without prior build (committed file)","Stale-file regression test passes","Generated file matches source SQL files in monorepo test"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: performAutoMigrateIfEnabled helper (TS)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create DI-friendly auto-migrate helper that encapsulates the decision tree (enabled/disabled, sqlite/no-url skip, success/failure) and migration execution. Throws on failure with `Auto-migration failed: <msg>` (caller wraps with `[taskcast]` prefix).

**Files:**
- Create: `packages/cli/src/auto-migrate.ts`

**Verify:** `cd packages/cli && pnpm lint && pnpm test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/cli/src/auto-migrate.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/cli && pnpm lint && pnpm test","acceptanceCriteria":["Module exports AutoMigrateOptions, AutoMigrateLogger, AutoMigrateDeps, performAutoMigrateIfEnabled","enabled=false ‚Üí no-op","sqlite mode or no postgresUrl ‚Üí skip with info log","Success path: applied N ‚Üí 'Applied N new migration(s): files'; up to date ‚Üí 'Database schema up to date (N migration(s) already applied)'","Failure path: closes connection (best-effort), throws Error with message starting 'Auto-migration failed:'","Helper does NOT call process.exit","deps.createSql and deps.logger are injectable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Extract runStart and wire auto-migrate (TS start.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Refactor `packages/cli/src/commands/start.ts` so the action body becomes an exported `runStart(options): Promise<{stop, port}>`. Insert `performAutoMigrateIfEnabled()` after URL resolution and before adapter creation. The `.action()` becomes a thin shim that catches errors ‚Üí `console.error('[taskcast] ' + msg)` ‚Üí `process.exit(1)`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `packages/cli/src/commands/start.ts`

**Verify:** `cd packages/cli && pnpm build && pnpm test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/cli/src/commands/start.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/cli && pnpm build && pnpm test","acceptanceCriteria":["runStart(options) exported with RunStartOptions/RunStartHandle types","runStart returns {stop, port} handle","performAutoMigrateIfEnabled is called BEFORE PostgresLongTermStore creation","On auto-migrate failure no adapters or HTTP server are created","Signal handlers (SIGTERM/SIGINT) registered ONLY by .action wrapper, not by runStart","All existing CLI tests still pass","console.error('[taskcast] ' + err.message) yields '[taskcast] Auto-migration failed: ...' (no double prefix)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Fix taskcast migrate subcommand to use embedded migrations
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Switch `packages/cli/src/commands/migrate.ts` from the monorepo-relative SQL directory path to the embedded `POSTGRES_MIGRATIONS` module. Delete the 'works in monorepo only' TODO comment. After this task, both auto-migrate AND manual migrate work identically when the CLI is installed via npm.

**Files:**
- Modify: `packages/cli/src/commands/migrate.ts`

**Verify:** `cd packages/cli && pnpm test tests/unit/migrate-command.test.ts && pnpm build`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/cli/src/commands/migrate.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/cli && pnpm test tests/unit/migrate-command.test.ts && pnpm build","acceptanceCriteria":["migrate.ts no longer uses fileURLToPath/import.meta.url for path resolution","Imports POSTGRES_MIGRATIONS from ../generated/postgres-migrations.js and buildMigrationFiles from @taskcast/postgres","TODO comment 'works in monorepo only' is deleted","runMigrations(sql, files) called with MigrationFile[] variant","Existing migrate-command unit tests still pass","Smoke test: taskcast migrate -y --url postgres://... applies both migrations and is idempotent on re-run"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Rust run_auto_migrate + build_postgres_long_term_store
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mirror TS auto-migrate in Rust. Add `run_auto_migrate(url)` helper that runs `sqlx::migrate!` and computes log strings symmetric to TS by querying `_sqlx_migrations` before/after. Add `build_postgres_long_term_store(...)` helper that encapsulates the auto-migrate decision and adapter creation, collapsing the existing two duplicate blocks in `start::run`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/start.rs`

**Verify:** `cd rust/taskcast-cli && cargo test --test start_tests --test start_env_tests && cd .. && cargo build`

```json:metadata
{"files":["rust/taskcast-cli/src/commands/start.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cd rust/taskcast-cli && cargo test --test start_tests --test start_env_tests && cd .. && cargo build","acceptanceCriteria":["start.rs reads TASKCAST_AUTO_MIGRATE via parse_boolean_env","run_auto_migrate uses temporary pool, closes pool on both success and failure","On success queries _sqlx_migrations before/after to compute newly-applied filenames using {version:03}_{description_with_underscores}.sql convention","Log lines symmetric with TS: 'Applied N new migration(s): files' or 'Database schema up to date (N migration(s) already applied)'","Failure wrapped with '[taskcast] Auto-migration failed: ' prefix","build_postgres_long_term_store collapses the two existing duplicate blocks in start::run","Skip path emits '[taskcast] TASKCAST_AUTO_MIGRATE is set but no Postgres configured ‚Äî skipping' and continues startup","All existing Rust CLI tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: TS integration + in-process E2E tests (testcontainers Postgres)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Integration tests covering all 8 cases of performAutoMigrateIfEnabled (happy, idempotency, disabled, no URL, sqlite mode, conn fail, checksum mismatch, dirty migration) plus one in-process E2E that calls runStart against a real Postgres container and verifies _sqlx_migrations + /health.

**Files:**
- Modify: `packages/cli/package.json` (add testcontainers devDep)
- Create: `packages/cli/tests/integration/auto-migrate.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd packages/cli && pnpm test tests/integration/auto-migrate.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["packages/cli/package.json","packages/cli/tests/integration/auto-migrate.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd packages/cli && pnpm test tests/integration/auto-migrate.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["testcontainers@^10.13.0 added to packages/cli devDependencies","pnpm install succeeds at repo root","Single shared Postgres container per suite (beforeAll/afterAll)","Per-test DB reset drops _sqlx_migrations and taskcast tables","All 8 state matrix cases covered: happy, idempotent, disabled, no URL, sqlite mode, conn fail, checksum mismatch, dirty migration","Failing-case tests assert via rejects.toThrow(/^Auto-migration failed:/) ‚Äî not via logger.error","In-process E2E test boots runStart, verifies _sqlx_migrations populated and /health responds","src/auto-migrate.ts coverage is 100%"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Rust integration + in-process E2E tests (start_env_tests.rs)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend `rust/taskcast-cli/tests/start_env_tests.rs` with auto-migrate tests using the existing EnvGuard + testcontainers pattern. Cover happy path, idempotency, skip-when-memory, and fail-fast on bad URL.

**Files:**
- Modify: `rust/taskcast-cli/tests/start_env_tests.rs`

**Verify:** `cd rust/taskcast-cli && cargo test --test start_env_tests`

```json:metadata
{"files":["rust/taskcast-cli/tests/start_env_tests.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cd rust/taskcast-cli && cargo test --test start_env_tests","acceptanceCriteria":["Uses existing EnvGuard and lock_env() pattern","start_postgres_container helper added (testcontainers PostgresContainer)","count_sqlx_migrations helper added","Happy path: env vars + tokio::spawn(start::run) + sleep + assert _sqlx_migrations count == 2 + /health 200 + handle.abort()","Idempotency: two boots in sequence both end with 2 rows in table","Skip path: TASKCAST_AUTO_MIGRATE=1 with memory storage starts normally","Fail-fast: bad URL ‚Üí start::run returns Err containing 'Auto-migration failed:'","All existing tests in start_env_tests.rs still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: CI staleness check for generated migrations file
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a CI step that runs the generator and `git diff --exit-code` against the committed `packages/cli/src/generated/postgres-migrations.ts` to catch PRs that modify SQL without regenerating.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`

**Verify:** `cd /Users/winrey/Projects/taskcast && node packages/cli/scripts/generate-migrations.mjs migrations/postgres packages/cli/src/generated/postgres-migrations.ts && git diff --exit-code packages/cli/src/generated/postgres-migrations.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":[".github/workflows/ci.yml"],"verifyCommand":"cd /Users/winrey/Projects/taskcast && node packages/cli/scripts/generate-migrations.mjs migrations/postgres packages/cli/src/generated/postgres-migrations.ts && git diff --exit-code packages/cli/src/generated/postgres-migrations.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["New CI step runs after pnpm install and before tests","Step regenerates the file and runs git diff --exit-code","Stale file fails CI with an actionable ::error:: message pointing at pnpm --filter @taskcast/cli build","Existing CI jobs continue to pass on the current committed state"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Documentation + changeset
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document TASKCAST_AUTO_MIGRATE in deployment.md (EN+ZH) and packages/cli/README.md. Add a release changeset marking @taskcast/cli and @taskcast/postgres as minor.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/guide/deployment.md`
- Modify: `docs/guide/deployment.zh.md`
- Modify: `packages/cli/README.md`
- Create: `.changeset/auto-migrate.md`

**Verify:** `grep -A1 TASKCAST_AUTO_MIGRATE docs/guide/deployment.md docs/guide/deployment.zh.md packages/cli/README.md && cat .changeset/auto-migrate.md`

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/guide/deployment.md","docs/guide/deployment.zh.md","packages/cli/README.md",".changeset/auto-migrate.md"],"verifyCommand":"grep -A1 TASKCAST_AUTO_MIGRATE docs/guide/deployment.md docs/guide/deployment.zh.md packages/cli/README.md && cat .changeset/auto-migrate.md","acceptanceCriteria":["deployment.md env var table includes TASKCAST_AUTO_MIGRATE row","deployment.md has new 'Database migrations' section with manual + automatic modes and multi-replica warning","deployment.zh.md mirrors EN changes in Chinese","packages/cli/README.md env var table includes TASKCAST_AUTO_MIGRATE row",".changeset/auto-migrate.md marks @taskcast/cli and @taskcast/postgres as minor with descriptive summary"]}
```
